{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220256507D48E7A810DB2C4EA701"}"},"total":5122},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7505078489093161752","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这真的好看 二设也挺合理的 有在盘逻辑 由于地狱磨灭了大家的记忆法力等等的设定 让远古时期八大恶魔君主的形象更饱满了 不是一群整天只会无能狂怒拿圣主出气的蠢恶魔  说实话真要是那么愚蠢内斗 远古时代根本就没法有八个君主 都不用不死神明 自己就打起来了  再说一次真的很好看 就是作者能不能突然更新几十章吓我一跳[送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747416352,"group_id":"7462989286732729406","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+QUv4NYVtrMlgKwbMYGuTHADFAAuCcy0dxq986IViQk","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/10dc6ff11dbe43648a19b12300a4e02f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702233&x-signature=WBdxMYUgShS60CpWeDT1XvYkO1s%3D","user_id":"2806425830298397","user_name":"无敌暴龙战士wst"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2806425830298397","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7462989286732729406","book_info":{"abstract":"【同人文】+【综漫快穿】+【剧情向】+【无女主】
“统子哥，我有一个问题？”一身优雅道袍的恶魔如是问道。
“请讲。”
“这里是成龙历险记对吧，我请问我的符咒呢？还有我现在到底是个什么样子？”
“符咒？这不是最基本的么，至于你，你可是伟大的月之恶魔啊！”
穿越成为月之恶魔咒蓝，周岚开始了自己传奇的一生。
【注】：本书为同人向，有大篇幅恶魔之间兄弟姐妹情描绘，为作者私设，不喜勿进。

,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2245,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":34388},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7505374419502547774","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看，为我们展现了一个完全不同的恶魔观，美中不足的就是恶魔的设定都还是挺好的，就是有点好过头了，怎么说呢，稍微威严一点，其中我们的主角作为恶魔也是充分执行恶魔理念，不要说善人了，就是妥妥一个恶人就是有点感情的恶人，也不会出现什么中途出现一个小女孩什么之类的，也不会出现什么好人做不好，恶人做不成这种尴尬局面。作者的文笔还不错，这些剧情方面也把握的很好，加油！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747484249,"group_id":"7462989286732729406","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我与番茄审核不共戴天，别说肉了，连汤都喝不了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxvbW2569XiqX0brrpLC7bprv4jommBIFITd9zBeuvTR","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/de3f2ab287434f809cd80cf91214e5f7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708135&x-signature=VPmlDG%2B%2FzAcvkADEdmtEOydULVI%3D","user_id":"1214282763091448","user_name":"云LOVE山"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1214282763091448","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7462989286732729406","book_info":{"abstract":"【同人文】+【综漫快穿】+【剧情向】+【无女主】
